name: se-morning-prep
description: SE Morning Prep automation for Wix Enterprise Solutions Engineering. Scans Google Calendar for upcoming external meetings, researches each company (web + Gong history + Coda demo guides), generates HTML briefs, and sends a Slack summary. Optionally creates personalised Wix demo sites.

skills.name: se-morning-prep
skills.description: Automated morning prep — scans the next 48h of calendar, researches external meetings, generates briefs, and sends Slack summary. Use this for the daily 7am scheduled run.

skills.name: se-prep-on-demand
skills.description: On-demand prep — scans 14 days of calendar, lets you pick which meetings to prep for, generates briefs, and optionally creates Wix demo sites. Use this anytime you want to prep for a specific upcoming meeting.

skills.name: se-prep-for
skills.description: Prep for a specific client — skip the calendar, just provide company name, domain, and attendees. Goes straight to research, brief generation, and Slack summary.

skills.name: se-demo-site
skills.description: Create a personalised Wix Studio demo site for a prospect, using parameters from an existing SE brief. Usage: 'Create demo site for [Company Name]'
